statement: In every magma, Equation 2631 (`x = (y * ((z * w) * z)) * w`) implies Equation 3936 (`x * y = (x * (z * x)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0185
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z w) z)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op x (op z x)) z)
